    A

    ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum class exchange.OfferStatus
    The offer was rejected
    acceptOffer() - Method in class exchange.Offer
    It allows a client to accept an incoming offer

    Adds a new collection of products to the pack

    Adds a pack to the cart

    Adds a pack to the cart

    Adds a product to the cart
    addCart(StoreProduct) - Method in class user.UnregisteredClient
    Adds a product to the cart

    It adds categories to the discount

    Adds a category to the store

    It allows the system or an employee to add categories to a product

    Adds and creates new comic
